# New Patient Form

**FIRST NAME:** Sophia  
**LAST NAME:** Doe  

**MARITAL STATUS:** ☐ Single ☐ Married ☐ Divorced ☐ Separated ☑ Widowed  

**ADDRESS:** 2237A Dove Rd  

**CITY:** Waimanalo  
**STATE:** HI  
**ZIP:** 96795  

**PHONE:** (758) 473-1776  
**DOB:** 04/27/1973  

**SPOUSE NAME:**  
**SPOUSE PHONE:**  

Is the requested medication ☑ NEW or a ☐ CONTINUATION of THERAPY? If so, start date: ___________  

Have you been hospitalized in the past year? ☑ Yes ☐ No

## Previous Health History

Have you received chiropractic care? ☑ Yes ☐ No  
Have you received acupuncture care? ☑ Yes ☐ No

dob.description: Patient's date of birth as it appears

zip.description: Patient's ZIP code as it appears

phone.description: Patient's phone number as it appears

address.description: Street address of the patient as it appears, only including number and street

isNewTherapy.description: Indicates if requested medicine is new, must return true or false

isHospitalized.description: Indicates if patient has been hospitalized in the past year, must return true or false

fever.description: Indicates if patient has experienced a fever, must return true or false

chills.description: Indicates if patient has experienced chills, must return true or false

coughing.description: Indicates if patient has experienced persistent coughing, must return true or false

seizures.description: Indicates if patient has experienced seizures, must return true or false

allergies.description: Indicates if patient has allergies, must return true or false

chestPain.description: Indicates if patient has experienced chest pain, must return true or false

blurredVision.description: Indicates if patient has experienced blurred vision, must return true or false

dentalProblems.description: Indicates if patient has experienced dental problems, must return true or false

enlargedGlands.description: Indicates if patient has experienced enlarged glands, must return true or false

excessiveStress.description: Indicates if patient has experienced excessive stress, must return true or false

excessiveBruising.description: Indicates if patient has experienced excessive bruising, must return true or false

shortnessOfBreath.description: Indicates if patient has experienced shortness of breath, must return true or false

irregularHeartRate.description: Indicates if patient has experienced an irregular heart rate, must return true or false

tuberculosisExposure.description: Indicates if patient has been exposed to tuberculosis, must return true or false

stomachTroubleOrUlcers.description: Indicates if patient has experienced stomach trouble or ulcers, must return true or false

reviewOfSymptoms.description: Indicates if specific symptoms are present or not

other.description: List of other prescription drugs that patient uses, must return null if not provided

dietPills.description: Indicates if patient uses diet pills, must return true or false

painPills.description: Indicates if patient uses pain pills, must return true or false

muscleRelaxers.description: Indicates if patient uses muscle relaxers, must return true or false

antidepressants.description: Indicates if patient uses antidepressants, must return true or false

birthControlPills.description: Indicates if patient uses birth control, must return true or false

bloodSugarMedication.description: Indicates if patient uses blood sugar medication, must return true or false

prescriptionDrugs.description: Details of prescription drugs currently taken

accidentsOrInjuries.description: List of accidents or injuries that patient has experienced, must return null if not provided

overTheCounterDrugs.description: List of over-the-counter drugs that patient uses, must return null if not provided

vitaminsOrSupplements.description: List of vitamins or supplements that patient takes, must return null if not provided

previousHealthHistory.description: Details of patient's previous health history
